metadata.description: AAVE V3-specific AI tools (skills, plugins, agents) for developers and AI agents integrating the AAVE protocol ecosystem.

plugins.name: aave-integration
plugins.description: Direct AAVE V3 protocol integration for reading on-chain data and executing transactions

plugins.name: aave-planner
plugins.description: Position planning and strategy generation for AAVE V3

plugins.description: Risk analysis and health factor monitoring for AAVE positions

plugins.description: Security guidance and audit checklists for AAVE integrations

plugins.name: aave-viem-integration
plugins.description: EVM blockchain integration using viem for AAVE operations
